commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
Destruction, (contritio.) St. Jerome reads "contraction "as also ver. 10. Protestants, "the morning. "(Haydock)
Chaldean, "the reign. "(Calmet)
Hebrew tsephira, is variously rendered. (Haydock)
Joy. Hebrew, "echo or cry "of people in the vintage.
